title: VrNights
description: Just a mod pack for thoses who like fnaf but want vr with some quilty of life mods sprinkeld on top of course
body:
# **Vr Nights**
![bad time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6d04e297ff44ca2ead76ade697c54bb3b41b684_0.webp)

Hello, and if you're reading this description, you're wondering if you should get this mod pack now. I will answer that in a second, but if you wanna play something like FNAF but in Minecraft, because well, let's just be honest, you don't want to get every single FNAF game right, and the VR ones on top of that, that's why I made this mod pack using the [Five Nights at Freddy's: Management Wanted](https://modrinth.com/mod/management-wanted) mod and the [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft) mod with a little bit of quality of life mods
### Well, Here You Go
I feel like I have made the best mod-pack for just that 

## Notes
- This was mostly made for my viewers who wanted to play my mods
- I will try my hardest to try to keep this up to date with what's shown in my videos 

## Videos
[Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXis7yxJrPwVBObPvY9nGhaKD-wzw82e7)
